metadata.title: States PCS: Uttar Pradesh GK Questions for UPPSC Examinations

questions.question: DASTAK campaign which was launched in Uttar Pradesh is associated with which of the following?
questions.explanation: DASTAK campaign was launched by UP Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath to eradicate communicable diseases as well as Acute Encephalitis Syndrome (AES) and Japanese Encephalitis (JE) disease. Japanese Encephalitis is a mosquito-borne (Culex species) disease.

questions.question: Which queen’s charity is mentioned on the Allahabad Pillar Edict?
questions.explanation: The Queen’s Edict on the Allahabad Pillar records charitable deeds of Karuvaki, Ashoka’s second wife. She is the only queen of Ashoka specifically mentioned in his inscriptions for her donations and gifts, making this a unique historical record.

questions.question: Charkula folk dance of Uttar Pradesh is performed to celebrate the birth of which deity?
questions.explanation: Charkula dance celebrates Radha’s birth and Krishna’s victory over Indra, performed in Braj region of Uttar Pradesh.

questions.question: Who was the leader of the Hindustan Republican Association involved in the Kakori Train robbery of 1925?
questions.explanation: Chandrashekhar Azad was a key leader of HRA and escaped arrest after the Kakori robbery, continuing revolutionary activities until 1931.

questions.question: Ragini Trivedi is associated with which art form?
questions.explanation: Ragini Trivedi, born in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, is renowned for her expertise in the Misrabani style and playing the vichitra veena, a rare Indian string instrument. She has contributed significantly to Hindustani classical music. The vichitra veena is notable for its fretless design.

questions.question: Who from Uttar Pradesh was titled ‘Mahamana’ by Mahatma Gandhi?
questions.explanation: Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya, a freedom fighter and founder of Banaras Hindu University, was called ‘Mahamana’ by Gandhi for his contributions to education and national development in India.

questions.question: Consider the following pairs of rivers and their districts of origin: Kuwana – Eastern Bahraich Terhi – Bahraich Manwar – Gonda Gambhir – Karauli (Rajasthan) Which of the pairs given above are correctly matched?
questions.explanation: All the rivers and their corresponding districts of origin are correctly matched: Kuwana originates in Eastern Bahraich Terhi originates in Bahraich Manwar originates in Gonda Gambhir originates in Karauli (Rajasthan) Accurate knowledge of Indian river origins enhances understanding of geographical diversity.

questions.question: Which of the following rivers merges with the Ghaghara River at Gorakhpur in Uttar Pradesh?
questions.explanation: Kuwana (Kuano) River joins the Ghaghara at Gorakhpur; others join at different locations.

questions.question: What is the current installed thermal power capacity of Uttar Pradesh Rajya Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited (UPRVUNL) in Uttar Pradesh?
questions.explanation: UPRVUNL’s installed thermal power capacity is 7,140 MW as of 2024–25, comprising five major state-owned thermal plants in Uttar Pradesh, making it a key electricity provider in the state.

questions.question: Which animal is primarily conserved in Meja tehsil, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh?
questions.explanation: Meja tehsil, Prayagraj, is home to about 350 blackbucks and is a major conservation area for this antelope species in Uttar Pradesh.
